events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Sending good vibes to the one and only Ringo Starr today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to rock royalty, Brian May! The Queen legend continues to inspire generations with his incredible guitar work. What's your go-to Queen anthem?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The energy of The Rolling Stones' frontman is simply unmatched. Wishing him a fantastic birthday!

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but what was your favourite music video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival turns 57
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there! What's your favourite performance from the legendary festival?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: August 16th marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: On this day, we remember The King, Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to shake, rattle, and roll the world. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: September 13th marks the anniversary of the passing of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legendary Flow
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. A true lyrical genius who left an undeniable mark on music and culture, gone too soon at 25. What's your favourite 2Pac track?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: September 18th marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God Tribute
angles.copy: The world lost a true visionary on this day. Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, whose influence on guitar music is simply immeasurable. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Walk The Line
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday on September 7th.

angles.name: Pretender's Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' legend continues to rock. What's your favourite song from her impressive career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday on September 21st.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune from the iconic frontman?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon released his seminal album 'Imagine' in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate with its powerful message of peace and unity. What does this track mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple unleashed this game-changer, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and revolutionising how we listen to music. Did you have one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best Bond theme song?

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9th marks the birthday of John Lennon, who would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Imagine Forever
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire millions around the globe. What's your most cherished John Lennon song?
